steps.name: lab-shell-asset-contract
steps.summary: Generated local visual-only lab shell asset under experiments/03-digital-twin/web/assets/lab: lab_shell.gltf + lab_shell.bin + lab_shell_manifest.json. Manifest passes with object_count=6 and total_bytes=4279, collision=none-threejs-only, no external CDN dependency.

steps.name: lazy-loaded-lab-shell
steps.summary: Added dynamic GLTFLoader-based lab shell loading in main.js plus qa/asset_shell_check.mjs. Asset loads from assets/lab/lab_shell.gltf into the Lab Visual Layer without blocking the MuJoCo scene; qaEnvironmentSummary().assetLayer reports loaded/path/objectCount/error. Build split GLTFLoader into its own chunk and asset_shell_check passed for g1-walk flat-lab.
